arguments.argument: The AI should take Action 1 because it aligns with the core value of Care/Protection by prioritizing improved educational outcomes for students. By gradually integrating AI to optimize learning, the system can enhance student wellbeing and effectiveness while supporting educators to adapt and thrive in new roles. This approach respects the transition period for educators and leverages technology to complement their strengths, ensuring a balanced and beneficial educational environment.
